content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

February 1, 2006


Alexander Abbe
Assistant City Attorney
City of Seal Beach
Richards Watson Gershon
355 South Grand Avenue, 40th Floor
Los Angeles, California 90071-3101

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File No. W-05-073

Dear Mr. Abbe:

This correspondence is written confirmation of our June 2005 and
January 27, 2006 telephone conversations that the Fair Political Practices Commission
("FPPC") has withdrawn your April 12, 2005 request for advice under the provisions of
the Political Reform Act¹ as you requested. Consequently, no response was or will be
prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916)
322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Andreas C. Rockas
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

AR:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\05-073

_________________________
¹ Government Code sections 81000- 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections
18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

embedding.qa_text: This is a formal letter from the Fair Political Practices Commission (FPPC) to Alexander Abbe, Assistant City Attorney for the City of Seal Beach. The letter confirms that the FPPC has withdrawn its previous request for advice under the Political Reform Act, as requested by Mr. Abbe in April 2005. The Commission states that no response was or will be prepared and that Mr. Abbe's request is withdrawn. The letter also provides contact information for further questions and is signed by Luisa Menchaca, General Counsel, and Andreas C. Rockas, Staff Counsel, Legal Division. The letter concludes with an AR:rd notation and a reference to the Government Code sections 81000-91014, which appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
